headline: What to Expect From Kimberly-Clark's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Kimberly-Clark is all set to announce its fiscal first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts project a single-digit earnings drop.

headline: 5 Baby Boomer Stock Favorites Now Trading at a Discount
summary: 5 popular Baby Boomer stocks are trading in discount territory, with MSFT down 23% YTD, RCL 25% off its highs, and VZ and KMB offering yields above 5%.
